description_long: This electric car features a sharply angular, geometric body with a matte dark finish, reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck. The vehicle has a trapezoidal profile with flat panels and a sloped roofline, giving it a futuristic, armored appearance. The wheels are robust and slightly inset, with minimalistic wheel arches and no visible side mirrors. The front end is defined by a continuous light bar, while the rear features a bold red light strip spanning the width of the vehicle. The windows are tinted black, and there are no visible door handles or trim, emphasizing a seamless, monolithic design. The car sits on a textured, urban ground surface, suggesting its suitability for city environments.
description: A matte dark, angular electric car with a futuristic, armored design and continuous light bars at the front and rear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a wide red light bar and the flat, angular back of the car.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the trapezoidal profile, sloped roof, and robust wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying a continuous white light bar and the sharply angled nose.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same geometric lines and dark finish.
